creator: roam@orbitel.bg
text:
On Sun, May 27, 2001 at 04:26:40PM +0200, Tobias Reifenberger wrote:
> 
> >Number:         27741
> >Category:       ports
> >Synopsis:       Update wterm port (Maintainer)
> >Originator:     Tobias Reifenberger
> >Organization:
> <Organization of PR author (multiple lines)>
> >Environment:
>         
> 
> >Description:
> 
>         The distfile is unfetchable.
> 
> >How-To-Repeat:
> 
> 
> >Fix:
> --------------9EE7D98065777D96F15A062C
> Content-Type: text/plain; charset=us-ascii;
>  name="port_wterm.diff"
> Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
> Content-Disposition: inline;
>  filename="port_wterm.diff"
> 
> diff -u --exclude=CVS -ruN --exclude=CVS wterm.orig/Makefile wterm/Makefile
> --- wterm.orig/Makefile	Sat Mar 10 14:01:25 2001
> +++ wterm/Makefile	Sun May 27 16:21:51 2001
> @@ -8,10 +8,9 @@
>  PORTNAME=	wterm
>  PORTVERSION=	6.2.8a2
>  CATEGORIES=	x11
> -MASTER_SITES= 	http://wm.current.nu/files/ \
> -		ftp://ftp.sunsite.auc.dk/disk1/linuxberg.com/files/x11/system/ \
> -		ftp://ftp.vision.net.au/ftp7/linuxberg/files/x11/system/ \
> -		ftp://ftp.cadvision.com/pub/linuxberg/files/x11/system/
> +MASTER_SITES=	http://wm.current.nu/files/ \
> +		ftp://sunsite.uio.no/pub/unix/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/ \
> +		ftp://ftp3.ru.freebsd.org/.0/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/

The last two sites in the new list seem to be FreeBSD mirrors.
I don't know what the policy on distfiles' mirroring is, but if these
should ever get wiped, this port would have distfile fetching problems
again.  Are you sure that this is what you want?

G'luck,
Peter

-- 
This sentence contains exactly threee erors.
